title: スーパーカーでドライブ！

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm so pumped about today's drive, Trainer! Let's
put the pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm so pumped about today's drive, Trainer! Let's
put the pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And away we go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tires squeal as Maruzensky's bright red sports
car takes off!
choice_data_list: Aren't you going a bit fast?!
Aren't you going a bit fast?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is nothing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We're about to get on the highway... and I feel
the need for speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The car barrels onto the highway.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We're only just getting started! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're speeding up even more!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's see what this baby can do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Check out these mad cornering skills!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yahoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The sports car drifts through a turn!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chillax over there!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I've got it all under control!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The car gains even more speed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Let's kick this party into high gear!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I mean, we are out for a drive after all! Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is something wrong, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is something wrong, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hello? Anybody home?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you okay? Am I going too fast for you?
choice_data_list: Let's push it to the limit!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Now you're talking!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's break on through, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's break on through, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Break on through to the other side of the sound
barrier, I mean! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Together, we can go anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Together, we can go anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What a view...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's my first time coming to this kinda place. I've
never seen anything like it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I guess this is what it means to go wherever the
wind takes you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That same wind carries Maruzensky's spellbound
whisper to my ear.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I understand. It's never good to go
overboard, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's a rest stop just up ahead. We'll pull in
there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky parks at the rest stop.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You okay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You okay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I got you a drink.
choice_data_list: Thanks. Ahh, that hits the spot!
Thanks. Ahh, that hits the spot!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Use that handkerchief, too. I wet it with cold
water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a fancy-looking handkerchief on the
table.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Put it on your face. It should help you feel better.
choice_data_list: Are you sure? It looks expensive.
Are you sure? It looks expensive.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You went out of your way to join me on the drive
today.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's only right that I take good care of you in
return! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's only right that I take good care of you in
return! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Maruzensky does continue taking care of me,
with the warmth of a true friend.
